location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 12+ years experience in consulting or strategy operations role
Works with Director of Services and Membership directly
Base pay range $168K-$203K consistent with senior IC at Airbnb
Expected to partner as a strategic peer with product and marketing leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 12+ years experience in consulting position, or strategy operations role and working across multiple geographies
Provide data driven insights quickly and accurately by leveraging tools such as SQL, excel and Tableau
Deep understanding of supply/demand dynamics, incentive design, and growth levers
Ability to manage complex projects and multi-task with excellent organization skills
Leadership and ability to influence other stakeholders
Ability to flourish with minimal guidance, be proactive, and handle uncertainty and ambiguity
Analysis and formulation of plans to address key business priorities or issues
Seasoned internal and external communicator with strong interpersonal skills
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Partner with product and marketing teams to translate business goals into program requirements and go-to-market strategies—speaking their language and earning their trust as a strategic peer
Identify new growth opportunities, design experiments to test hypotheses, and develop plans to scale proven levers

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in loyalty programs, incentive programs, or merchandising strongly preferred

explicitly_excluded: Candidates located in: Alaska, Indiana, Nebraska, North Dakota, Ohio, South Dakota, Wisconsin, Alabama, Mississippi, Oklahoma, Delaware, Rhode Island

scope.surface: Services & Membership team — programs driving growth levers for Airbnb guests and hosts
scope.business_model: B2C and B2B marketplace (host supply and guest demand)
primary_metrics_inferred: Program-driven growth in guest and host engagement
Revenue impact from new programs and levers
core_responsibilities: Develop actionable business analysis to enable functional leads to provide consistent information
Provide data driven insights using SQL, Excel, and Tableau
Partner with product and marketing teams to translate business goals into program requirements and go-to-market strategies
Identify new growth opportunities and design experiments to test hypotheses
Build tools and equip teams with relevant data support to make actionable decisions
Create materials to communicate strategy and business performance to key stakeholders
Manage cross-functional workstreams across product, marketing, data science, finance, partnerships, and business operations

compensation.equity_form: bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned

green_flags: Remote-US eligible with flexible office attendance
Clear scope of ownership — Services & Membership team with Director-level reporting relationship
Bonus and equity mentioned in addition to base
Role spans strategy and execution, offering breadth
red_flags: 12+ years of experience is a high bar that narrows the candidate pool significantly
Multiple states excluded from remote eligibility — list is noted as evolving, creating ongoing uncertainty
Visa sponsorship status not stated — unclear for non-citizen applicants
Posting first seen and last updated dates unavailable — freshness unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range + years + reporting relationship)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not in JD)
ambiguities: The JD says the role is 'US - Remote Eligible' but also notes occasional office work 'as agreed to with your manager' — treated as remote-us with optional office attendance rather than hybrid, since no minimum percentage is stated.

'Background in loyalty programs, incentive programs, or merchandising strongly preferred' uses the word 'strongly preferred' which could be interpreted as near-hard; classified as nice-to-have (soft) per instruction but flagged here.
manages_people: not explicitly stated; inferred as false from job description language, though the seniority and scope suggest possible informal people leadership
